It uses helpful comparisons and concrete details (3–4 units of heat, 95% furnace efficiency, cold-climate caveat) without wandering. rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers both how heat pumps work and why a homeowner might choose one. It uses helpful comparisons and concrete details (3–4 units of heat, 95% furnace efficiency, cold-climate caveat) without wandering. Slightly less plain in spots—phrases like "inherently inefficient" and "future-proofs" feel a bit promotional or overstated—but overall it is strong, concise, and reader-friendly.
